_usage: Load this file to configure the AiSchemaAnalyzer before running templates.

openAi._comment: OpenAI API settings. The API key MUST be set via the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable, never hard-coded here.
_modelOptions: gpt-3.5-turbo    – lowest cost, less reliable JSON output
openAi._temperatureNote: Low temperature (0–0.3) produces more consistent, deterministic JSON output.

costControl._comment: Settings to help manage API costs during development and testing.
costControl._enableAiAnalysisNote: Set to false to disable all AI API calls and use fallback analysis.
costControl._cacheNote: When true, responses are cached in /tmp/ai-cache so re-runs don't repeat API calls.

features._comment: Feature toggles to control which AI capabilities are active.

prompts._systemPromptOverrideNote: Set to a string to replace the built-in system prompt entirely.
prompts._additionalInstructionsNote: Append extra instructions to the user prompt without replacing the default.
